234, 255, 0.1);\n}\n\n* {\n  margin: 0;\n  padding: 0;\n  box-sizing: border-box;\n}\n\nbody {\n  font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--background-dark) 0%, var(--background-card) 50%, var(--background-light) 100%);\n  color: var(--text-primary);\n  line-height: 1.6;\n  overflow-x: hidden;\n}\n\n.app {\n  min-height: 100vh;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n}\n\n/* Animations */\n@keyframes fadeIn {\n  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }\n  to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }\n}\n\n@keyframes pulse {\n  0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }\n  50% { opacity: 0.7; }\n}\n\n@keyframes glow {\n  0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 234, 255, 0.3); }\n  50% { box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(0, 234, 255, 0.6); }\n}\n\n.fade-in {\n  animation: fadeIn 0.5s ease-out;\n}\n\n.pulse {\n  animation: pulse 2s infinite;\n}\n\n.glow {\n  animation: glow 3s infinite;\n}\n\n/* Scrollbar styling */\n::-webkit-scrollbar {\n  width: 8px;\n}\n\n::-webkit-scrollbar-track {\n  background: var(--background-dark);\n}\n\n::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n  background: var(--primary-color);\n  border-radius: 4px;\n}\n\n::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {\n  background: var(--accent-color);\n}\n\n/* Selection styling */\n::selection {\n  background: rgba(0, 234, 255, 0.3);\n  color: var(--text-primary);\n}\n\n/* Focus styles */\n*:focus {\n  outline: 2px solid var(--primary-color);\n  outline-offset: 2px;\n}\n\n/* Responsive design */\n@media (max-width: 768px) {\n  body {\n    font-size: 14px;\n  }\n}\n\n@media (max-width: 480px) {\n  body {\n    font-size: 12px;\n  }\n}",""]);const l=i},9088(e){"use strict";e.exports=function(e){var t=document.createElement("style");return ri=Jo("MuiTouchRipple",["root","ripple","rippleVisible","ripplePulsate","child","childLeaving","childPulsate"]),ni=so`
  0% {
    transform: scale(0);
    opacity: 0.1;
  }
 
  100% {
    transform: scale(1);
    opacity: 0.3;
  }
`,oi=so`
  0% {
    opacity: 1;
  }
 
  100% {
    opacity: 0;
  }
`,ai=so`
  0% {
    transform: scale(1);
  }
 
  50% {
    transform: scale(0.92);
  }
 
  100% {
    transform: scale(1);
  }
`,ii=ga("span",{name:"MuiTouchRipple",slot:"Root"})({overflow:"hidden",pointerEvents:"none",position:"absolute",zIndex:0,top:0,right:0,bottom:0,left:0,borderRadius:"inherit"}),li=ga(function(e){const{className:t,classes:r,pulsate:o=!1,rippleX:a,rippleY:i,rippleSize:l,in:s,onExited:c,timeout:u}=e,[d,f]=n.useState(!1),p=Ln(t,r.ripple,r.rippleVisible,o&&r.ripplePulsate),h={width:l,height:l,top:-l/2+i,left:-l/2+a},m=Ln(r.child,d&&r.childLeaving,o&&r.childPulsate);return s||d||f(!0),n.useEffect(()=>{if(!s&&null!=c){const e=setTimeout(c,u);return()=>{clearTimeout(e)}}},[c,s,u]),(0,rr.jsx)("span",{className:p,style:h,children:(0,rr.jsx)("span",{className:m})})},{name:"MuiTouchRipple",slot:"Ripple"})`
  opacity: 0;
  position: absolute;
 
  &.${ri.rippleVisible} {
    opacity: 0.3;
    transform: scale(1);
    animation-name: ${ni};
    animation-duration: ${550}ms;
    animation-timing-function: ${({theme:e})=>e.transitions.easing.easeInOut};
  }
 
  &.${ri.ripplePulsate} {
    animation-duration: ${({theme:e})=>e.transitions.duration.shorter}ms;
  }
 
  & .${ri.child} {
    opacity: 1;
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background-color: currentColor;
  }
 
  & .${ri.childLeaving} {
    opacity: 0;
    animation-name: ${oi};
    animation-duration: ${550}ms;
    animation-timing-function: ${({theme:e})=>e.transitions.easing.easeInOut};
  }
 
  & .${ri.childPulsate} {
    position: absolute;
    /* @noflip */
    left: 0px;
    top: 0;
    animation-name: ${ai};
    animation-duration: 2500ms;
    animation-timing-function: ${({theme:e})=>e.transitions.easing.easeInOut};
    animation-iteration-count: infinite;
    animation-delay: 200ms;
  }

  0% {

    opacity: 0;
    background-position: 0 -23px;
  }

    opacity: 1;
